{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032318120122385302AC840169A58D\"}"},"total":8010},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6857777656252530692","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书总体来说非常不错，和《三国之刘备军师》有点相似，主人公陈轩也和那本书的陈隐轩名字很像，不知作者有没有借鉴，不过风格是不一样的，里面的陈轩直接果断，敢做敢当，曹操豪情万丈，刘备阴险狡诈，我很喜欢，并且作者连什么年代发生的事都写得很清楚，可见作者用心了，作者大大加油更新，我会继续支持的！最后，我个人希望陈轩可以为曹操效力（个人意见，不喜勿喷），顺便五星好评奉上！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1596700790,"group_id":"6849291566918405134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无形无踪无影无迹","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1ay9rKpIwLv+d44Rzhqqzg=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/a6d1435ca14547fa8ae3c31e039fa206~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776792472\u0026x-signature=9xt5bA9mhZfq%2BUNAP71vyjtQyY4%3D","user_id":"13821135221","user_name":"黑暗君主NULL"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"13821135221","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6849291566918405134","book_info":{"abstract":"陈轩一觉醒来，穿越到了东汉末年。乱世中为了混口饭吃，开了家小酒馆勉强度日。只是没想到随便招了个伙计，竟然是恶来典韦。他更不知道的是，每天被他骂的狗血淋头的，乃是魏王曹操。跟在他屁股后面，问一些白痴问题的，是大谋士荀彧。直到有一天，陈轩喜欢的甄宓被迫要嫁给袁绍的儿子，陈轩一怒之下曝光了自己的身份。整个天下都轰动了，曹操，刘备，孙策，公孙瓒……闻风而动。十八路诸侯会师，讨伐袁绍。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/8c3d6fce815adc0f7a9baaef446e2147","author":"乔木11","author_id":"","book_id":"6849291566918405134","book_name":"三国：先生没想到吧，我就是曹操","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":67,\"name\":\"三国\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67\u0026name=三国\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":852,\"name\":\"魂穿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852\u0026name=魂穿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6849292451442934283","read_count":"11738","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1759003"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"878","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,三国,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/de0a1b52fa78648bce81abb252150608~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779444721\u0026x-signature=o5SIJRISaJTvF2%2BDgjbDZe5LQis%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"307479535425374","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032318120122385302AC840169A58D\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":9872},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1597768918,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6936543826517803042","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本三国是真的不错。比大多数系统都好很多。属于半无敌文那种。本人喜欢主角。有心计谋算。像这种又是军师又是武将。感觉还不错。这本三国我会追下去的。一直到完结。作者加油！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1615039967,"group_id":"6849291566918405134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4eTHp/Ayyp/+n5TmhWP0pu0nzKholM7vVhFZg4sHheB","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/5db07a49454a401aa14f12e10a7502d3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776789715\u0026x-signature=lfd8Q2Pbc2R9ey%2FgOvIfplRZh1M%3D","user_id":"3878666902176142","user_name":"无语白票"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3878666902176142","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6849291566918405134","book_info":{"abstract":"陈轩一觉醒来，穿越到了东汉末年。乱世中为了混口饭吃，开了家小酒馆勉强度日。只是没想到随便招了个伙计，竟然是恶来典韦。他更不知道的是，每天被他骂的狗血淋头的，乃是魏王曹操。跟在他屁股后面，问一些白痴问题的，是大谋士荀彧。直到有一天，陈轩喜欢的甄宓被迫要嫁给袁绍的儿子，陈轩一怒之下曝光了自己的身份。整个天下都轰动了，曹操，刘备，孙策，公孙瓒……闻风而动。十八路诸侯会师，讨伐袁绍。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/8c3d6fce815adc0f7a9baaef446e2147","author":"乔木11","author_id":"","book_id":"6849291566918405134","book_name":"三国：先生没想到吧，我就是曹操","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":67,\"name\":\"三国\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67\u0026name=三国\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":852,\"name\":\"魂穿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852\u0026name=魂穿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6849292451442934283","read_count":"11738","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1759003"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"878","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,三国,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/de0a1b52fa78648bce81abb252150608~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779444721\u0026x-signature=o5SIJRISaJTvF2%2BDgjbDZe5LQis%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"307479535425374","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032318120122385302AC840169A58D\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":292,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":50716,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":17832},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6927171285982625795","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"有燃点也有泪点。同时对于主角的情感刻画是非常细腻的。在我看过的三国文里面，属于比较好的那一类。都是从史书上面进行改编的。同时对于一类小人，主角的处理方式也是特别的优秀。总体来说非常好看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1612857757,"group_id":"6849291566918405134","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"书虫","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1OZ+axdfvhEu+KIacy7HQ89UOqBs0a1oJO+0ewKpfNq","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/f63d0f778c8c4e54940b31b4f617298e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776792829\u0026x-signature=KxHDwalsXktkmIBxHLM0wJdq16s%3D","user_id":"1877609308227240","user_name":"中华小埋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1877609308227240","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6849291566918405134","book_info":{"abstract":"陈轩一觉醒来，穿越到了东汉末年。乱世中为了混口饭吃，开了家小酒馆勉强度日。只是没想到随便招了个伙计，竟然是恶来典韦。他更不知道的是，每天被他骂的狗血淋头的，乃是魏王曹操。跟在他屁股后面，问一些白痴问题的，是大谋士荀彧。直到有一天，陈轩喜欢的甄宓被迫要嫁给袁绍的儿子，陈轩一怒之下曝光了自己的身份。整个天下都轰动了，曹操，刘备，孙策，公孙瓒……闻风而动。十八路诸侯会师，讨伐袁绍。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/8c3d6fce815adc0f7a9baaef446e2147","author":"乔木11","author_id":"","book_id":"6849291566918405134","book_name":"三国：先生没想到吧，我就是曹操","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":67,\"name\":\"三国\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=67\u0026name=三国\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":852,\"name\":\"魂穿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852\u0026name=魂穿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6849292451442934283","read_count":"11738","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1759003"},"re
